story.text:
# 💡 C87 · The Key Accumulates
**concept** · shared · knowledge

The City Key trust recursion admits an IVC realization (Key = accumulator, trust tasks = step circuits, Charge = folding step, V63 = attested invariant); LatticeFold makes the substrate post-quantum-hedged. The holonic Swordsman City Key in spellweb is this conjecture made interactive. Active (50% · Run 5).
